changeSet.author: vacancyscout
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION compute_vacancy_translation_search_vector() RETURNS trigger AS $$ BEGIN NEW.search_vector := to_tsvector( NEW.lang::regconfig, COALESCE(NEW.title, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(NEW.company_name, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(NEW.description, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(NEW.requirements, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(NEW.responsibilities, '') ); UPDATE vacancies SET search_text = ( SELECT COALESCE(v.title, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(v.company_name, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(v.description, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(v.requirements, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(v.responsibilities, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(NEW.title, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(NEW.company_name, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(NEW.description, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(NEW.requirements, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(NEW.responsibilities, '') FROM vacancies v WHERE v.id = NEW.vacancy_id ) WHERE id = NEW.vacancy_id; RETURN NEW; END; $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
CREATE TRIGGER trg_search_vector BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON vacancy_translations FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION compute_vacancy_translation_search_vector();
